title: Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Consultant Physician with drive and ambition, Aster DM Healthcare Capital India in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Aster DM Healthcare Capital India:
Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare Capital India!
